---
title: "Publications"
format: html
listing:
  contents: resources/biblio/bibliography.yml
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: "YYYY" # Forces just the year to show
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, author, journal, description, tags] # Added description here
---

<style>
  /* Stack the layout vertically instead of squishing columns */
  .quarto-listing-default .listing-item {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color-translucent);
  }
  
  /* Make dates bold and prominent */
  .quarto-listing-default .listing-date {
    font-weight: bold;
    color: var(--bs-primary);
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  
  /* Resize the giant title */
  .listing-title {
    font-size: 1.25rem !important;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  
  /* Give authors full width and a slightly muted color */
  .quarto-listing-default .listing-author {
    max-width: 100% !important;
    color: var(--bs-gray-700);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  
  /* Style links in the description to look like buttons */
  .listing-description a {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
    margin-top: 0.2rem;
    margin-right: 0.5rem;
    background-color: var(--bs-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
    border-radius: 4px;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--bs-body-color);
  }
  .listing-description a:hover {
    background-color: var(--bs-gray-200);
  }

</style>

Here is the complete list of our research publications. You can click on the years or categories on the right to filter the list.

<script>
window.addEventListener("load", function() {
  const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  const searchQuery = urlParams.get('search');
  
  if (searchQuery) {
    // Look specifically for Quarto's search input class
    const searchBox = document.querySelector('input.search');
    
    if (searchBox) {
      // Type the query into the box
      searchBox.value = searchQuery;
      
      // Fire all possible events to wake up Quarto's List.js filtering engine
      searchBox.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
      searchBox.dispatchEvent(new Event('keyup', { bubbles: true }));
      searchBox.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
    }
  }
});
</script>
